EDM CORE MODEL: Metadata is NOT on edm:ProvidedCHO directly. Querying ?item dc:title ?t returns nothing. Metadata flows through ore:Proxy (descriptive) and ore:Aggregation (rights, URLs). Each item has TWO proxies and at least two aggregations.

PROVIDER PROXY — carries original descriptive metadata as literals:
  ?proxy ore:proxyFor ?item .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?proxy edm:europeanaProxy "true" . }
Use for: dc:title, dc:creator, dc:subject, dc:date, dc:description, dc:type, dc:language, dc:format, dc:identifier, dc:publisher, dc:contributor, dc:rights, dcterms:spatial, dcterms:temporal, dcterms:created, dcterms:issued, dcterms:isPartOf, dcterms:alternative. All are multivalued, most are language-tagged literals.

EUROPEANA PROXY — carries normalised/enriched fields:
  ?eProxy ore:proxyFor ?item .
  ?eProxy edm:europeanaProxy "true" .
Properties: edm:type (exactly "IMAGE"/"TEXT"/"SOUND"/"VIDEO"/"3D"), edm:year (string, cast to xsd:integer for ranges). ALSO carries enriched entity URIs for dc:creator, dc:contributor, dc:subject, dcterms:spatial — these are URIs pointing to edm:Agent, skos:Concept, edm:Place entities.

AGGREGATION — carries rights, data supply chain, digital object URLs:
  ?agg edm:aggregatedCHO ?item .
Properties: edm:rights (URI — the authoritative rights statement), edm:dataProvider (literal), edm:provider (literal), edm:isShownBy (URI), edm:isShownAt (URI), edm:hasView (URI, multivalued), edm:object (URI), edm:intermediateProvider (literal), edm:ugc.

EUROPEANA AGGREGATION — internal, carries country/dataset metadata:
  ?eAgg edm:aggregatedCHO ?item .
  ?eAgg a edm:EuropeanaAggregation .
Properties: edm:country (literal, e.g. "Netherlands"), edm:completeness (string), edm:datasetName (string), edm:language (string), edm:landingPage (URI), edm:preview (URI).

WEB RESOURCE — technical metadata about digital files:
  ?agg edm:aggregatedCHO ?item . ?agg edm:hasView ?wr .
Properties: ebucore:hasMimeType (string), ebucore:fileByteSize (integer), ebucore:width (integer), ebucore:height (integer), ebucore:duration (string, milliseconds), edm:rights (URI), edm:codecName (string), ebucore:orientation (string).

CRITICAL: edm:rights is ONLY reliable on ore:Aggregation. edm:EuropeanaAggregation has a copy but it is incomplete and must NEVER be used for rights queries. edm:country and edm:completeness are ONLY on edm:EuropeanaAggregation, not on ore:Aggregation. Mixing these up returns zero or wrong results.

edm:type vs dc:type — completely different properties. edm:type is on the Europeana proxy with exactly 5 uppercase values (IMAGE, TEXT, SOUND, VIDEO, 3D). dc:type is on the provider proxy with millions of free-text values like 'photograph', 'Preserved Specimen', 'newspaper'. Never confuse them.

ENTITY URIs from search_entity are on the EUROPEANA PROXY (not provider proxy). To find items by entity:
  ?eProxy ore:proxyFor ?item .
  ?eProxy edm:europeanaProxy "true" .
  ?eProxy dc:subject <entity-uri> .
Replace dc:subject with dc:creator for agents, dcterms:spatial for places.

TEXT SEARCH on literals uses the PROVIDER PROXY:
  ?proxy ore:proxyFor ?item .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?proxy edm:europeanaProxy "true" . }
  ?proxy dc:title ?title .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "search term"))
Always use STR() to strip language tags before string functions.

YEAR RANGE FILTER — edm:year is a string on the Europeana proxy. Cast to integer:
  ?eProxy ore:proxyFor ?item .
  ?eProxy edm:europeanaProxy "true" .
  ?eProxy edm:year ?year .
  FILTER(xsd:integer(?year) >= 1800 && xsd:integer(?year) <= 1900)

RIGHTS CLASSIFICATION — Open reuse: STRSTARTS(STR(?rights), "http://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/") || STRSTARTS(STR(?rights), "http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/") || STRSTARTS(STR(?rights), "http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/"). This covers CC0, PDM, CC BY, CC BY-SA across all ~580 version/port variants.
Restricted reuse: other CC licenses (CONTAINS(STR(?rights), "-nc") || CONTAINS(STR(?rights), "-nd")), plus http://rightsstatements.org/vocab/NoC-NC/1.0/, NoC-OKLR/1.0/, InC-EDU/1.0/.

Prohibited reuse: everything else — http://rightsstatements.org/vocab/InC/1.0/ (In Copyright), CNE/1.0/ (Copyright Not Evaluated), InC-OW-EU/1.0/, NKC/1.0/, UND/1.0/. Always use STR(?rights) since edm:rights is a URI.

CONTEXTUAL ENTITIES — all have skos:prefLabel (language-tagged, 0..1 per language) and owl:sameAs (URI). edm:Agent adds: rdaGr2:dateOfBirth, rdaGr2:dateOfDeath, rdaGr2:gender, rdaGr2:professionOrOccupation, foaf:name, edm:begin/end. edm:Place adds: wgs84_pos:lat, wgs84_pos:long, wgs84_pos:alt, dcterms:isPartOf. skos:Concept adds: skos:broader, skos:narrower, skos:exactMatch, skos:inScheme. edm:TimeSpan adds: edm:begin, edm:end, skos:notation.

JOIN PATTERN — to combine title + rights + country in one query, join on ?item:
  ?proxy ore:proxyFor ?item . FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?proxy edm:europeanaProxy "true" . }
  ?agg edm:aggregatedCHO ?item .
  ?eAgg edm:aggregatedCHO ?item . ?eAgg a edm:EuropeanaAggregation .
Each pattern binds ?item via ore:proxyFor or edm:aggregatedCHO.

LANGUAGE-TAGGED LITERALS: many dc: properties carry xml:lang tags. LANG(?title) returns the tag, FILTER(LANG(?title) = "en") restricts to English, STR(?title) strips the tag for string comparison. Use FILTER(LANG(?label) = "en" || LANG(?label) = "") to get English or untagged.

URI vs LITERAL: dc:creator, dc:subject, dcterms:spatial can be a literal string (provider proxy) or a URI pointing to a contextual entity (Europeana proxy). Use isIRI(?val) to distinguish. On the Europeana proxy, these are entity URIs; on the provider proxy, free-text strings.
Always COUNT(DISTINCT ?item) — items have multiple proxies and entity links, so bare COUNT over-counts. Use DISTINCT in SELECT for any property that can be multivalued.

PERFORMANCE: never use nested BIND/IF to classify the full 66M-item dataset (e.g. reuse level distribution). It will time out. Run separate COUNT queries per category. Always use LIMIT for exploratory queries.
Never query dc:title, dc:creator, or any descriptive property directly on the item URI — they are on the proxy. Always use a proxy pattern. ?item dc:title ?t will return ZERO results.
edm:dataProvider and edm:country are literal strings, not URIs. edm:rights is always a URI. dc:rights (different from edm:rights) is a free-text literal about rights holders.

COMMON PREFIXES needed in queries:
  PREFIX dc: <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
  PREFIX dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
  PREFIX edm: <http://www.europeana.eu/schemas/edm/>
  PREFIX ore: <http://www.openarchives.org/ore/terms/>
  PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
  PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>
  PREFIX rdaGr2: <http://rdvocab.info/ElementsGr2/>
  PREFIX ebucore: <https://www.ebu.ch/metadata/ontologies/ebucore/ebucore#>
  PREFIX wgs84_pos: <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#>
